description.en: SHRDLU showed that a computer could carry on a constrained but surprisingly rich dialogue about a toy blocks world. Winograd combined parsing, planning, procedural semantics, and a small world model so natural-language commands could become robot-like actions. Its power came from tight integration: language worked because the world was limited and explicitly represented.
description.zh: SHRDLU 展示了计算机可以围绕一个受限但丰富的积木世界进行对话。Winograd 把句法分析、规划、过程语义和小型世界模型结合起来，让自然语言命令转化为类似机器人操作的动作。它的力量来自紧密集成：语言之所以有效，是因为世界被限制并被明确表示。

html.en: Early language programs often handled isolated sentences. SHRDLU made language, reference, memory, and action share one miniature world.
html.zh: 早期语言程序往往只处理孤立句子。SHRDLU 让语言、指称、记忆和动作共享同一个微型世界。

html.en: The system understood utterances by grounding them in blocks, spatial relations, and procedures that could actually change the scene.
html.zh: 系统通过积木、空间关系和可以改变场景的过程来落地理解用户话语。

html.en: Experts generally treat SHRDLU as a classic demonstration of both the promise and brittleness of microworld AI. Its long-term legacy is showing that language understanding can look powerful when grounded in a tightly constrained world model, while also exposing the limits of that constraint.
html.zh: 专家通常把 SHRDLU 视为微世界 AI 的希望与脆弱性的经典展示。它的长期影响在于说明语言理解在受限世界模型中可以显得很强大，同时也暴露了这种限制本身的边界。

artifact.zh: 交互式积木世界对话系统

material.en: MIT thesis and AI Lab reports
material.zh: 麻省理工学院 论文与 AI Lab 报告

demo.en: Parse language into plans over visible blocks
demo.zh: 把语言解析为可见积木上的计划

text.en: A narrow environment makes language and action tractable.
text.zh: 受限环境让语言和动作变得可处理。

text.en: Meaning is tied to procedures the system can run.
text.zh: 意义绑定到系统可执行的过程。

text.en: The system maps words like "the red block" to objects in the scene.
text.zh: 系统把“红色积木”等表达映射到场景对象。

description.en: Repository record for Winograd's language-understanding work.
description.zh: 麻省理工学院仓储记录，收录维诺格拉德的语言理解工作。

license.en: Reference link only; local visual is redrawn and does not reuse thesis figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地视觉图为重绘，不复用论文图形。

label.zh: 在理解自然语言的计算机程序中把过程作为数据表示
